goal: Refactor agent/retrieval to extract a shared result format used by all pipeline stages
Consolidate config loading from agent_config, retrieval_config, and repo_graph_config into a shared config loader module
Extract common prompt-loading logic from planner and replanner into agent/prompts
Refactor agent/execution to share step validation logic between policy_engine and step_dispatcher
Extract trace event type constants to agent/observability/trace_events.py
Refactor editing pipeline to share diff planning logic between diff_planner and patch_generator
Extract tool graph node definitions from tool_graph.py into config/tool_graph_config.py
Consolidate model call params loading across agent/models into a single entry point
Refactor repo_graph and repo_index to share symbol-to-module mapping logic
Extract repeated validation logic from agent/roles into a shared validation module
Rename get_model_call_params to get_model_params across agent/models and planner
Rename run_retrieval_pipeline to run_pipeline in agent/retrieval and all callers
Rename AgentState.context keys retrieved_files to context_files for consistency
Rename build_repo_map to build_repo_map_json in repo_graph and update callers
Rename call_small_model to call_fast_model across agent/
Rename rank_context to rank_candidates in agent/retrieval
Rename prune_context to prune_ranked_context in agent/retrieval
Rename dispatch to dispatch_step in step_dispatcher and update all references
Rename execute_with_policy to execute_step_with_policy in policy_engine
Rename AgentWorkspace.candidate_files to localized_files across agent/roles
Add caching to the retrieval pipeline: cache symbol_graph lookups in agent/retrieval
Add timeout configuration to model_client and propagate to all model call sites
Add retry logic to SEARCH step in policy_engine with configurable max_retries
Add health check script that validates model server, index, and repo_map availability
Add trace_id to all log_event calls in agent/roles for correlation
Add localization_accuracy and impact_prediction_accuracy to eval report output
Add context_compression_ratio metric when context_compressor is used
Add long_horizon_success_rate to repository eval report
Add max_repo_scan_files validation in repo_summary_graph when limit is exceeded
Add impact_analyzer result to trace log when edit affects multiple files
Update config/repo_intelligence_config.py to add ENABLE_REPO_INTELLIGENCE flag
Add REPO_INTELLIGENCE_TIMEOUT to config and use in build_repo_summary_graph
Update retrieval_config to add MAX_CONTEXT_COMPRESSION_RATIO
Add IMPACT_ANALYZER_ENABLED flag to repo_intelligence_config
Update agent_config to include Phase 10 limits in default config
Add ARCHITECTURE_MAP_CACHE_TTL to repo_intelligence_config
Update models_config.json to add task params for architecture_map classification
Add CONTEXT_COMPRESSOR_MAX_SUMMARY_TOKENS to config
Update repo_graph_config to add REPO_MAP_CACHE_PATH
Add LONG_HORIZON_PLANNER_MAX_MODULES to repo_intelligence_config
